Settings Page UI Sections (AWS Bedrock + PE MCP + Session History)

nodes.label: DuckDB Native Module asar Unpack
nodes.rationale: Native .node modules (including DuckDB) cannot run from inside an asar archive; they are unpacked so the OS can load them directly.

nodes.label: CPS Contract Parser End User License Agreement
nodes.norm_label: cps contract parser end user license agreement

nodes.label: CPS Rate Extraction Engine System Prompt v5.7
nodes.norm_label: cps rate extraction engine system prompt v5.7

nodes.label: Invariant I1: Rate Code Validation
nodes.rationale: Rate codes are constrained to an approved list to prevent phantom or invented codes from corrupting downstream PE data warehouse queries.

nodes.label: Invariant I2: Contract Form Is Authoritative
nodes.rationale: When rate sheet and signed contract form conflict, the contract form wins; discrepancies are noted in rate notes for human review.
nodes.norm_label: invariant i2: contract form is authoritative

nodes.label: Invariant I3: Net Cost Model
nodes.rationale: CPS operates net cost: rateAmount is what CPS pays the supplier, not the retail/sell price, ensuring margin is calculated correctly downstream.

nodes.label: Content Security Policy (renderer)
nodes.rationale: Strict CSP restricts scripts to self-origin only (no CDN, no inline except style) to contain the Electron renderer sandbox and prevent XSS/injection from parsed PDF content.

nodes.label: Pink Elephant MCP Endpoint Settings Section
